account_id.description: The unique identifier for the AWS account that owns the multi-region access point.

alias.description: A user-friendly name for the multi-region access point.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the multi-region access point.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the multi-region access point was created.

domain_name.description: The domain name associated with the multi-region access point.

id.description: The unique identifier for the multi-region access point.

public_access_block.description: Settings that manage public access to the multi-region access point.

regions.description: A list of regions and corresponding bucket configurations for the multi-region access point.

status.description: The current operational status of the multi-region access point.
